lex.bot.dtmfspecification.DeletionCharac.Description: The DTMF character that clears the accumulated DTMF digits and immediately ends the input.

lex.bot.dtmfspecification.EndCharacter.Description: The DTMF character that immediately ends input. If the user does not press this character, the input ends after the end timeout.

lex.bot.dtmfspecification.EndTimeoutMs.Description: How long the bot should wait after the last DTMF character input before assuming that the input has concluded.

lex.bot.dtmfspecification.MaxLength.Description: The maximum number of DTMF digits allowed in an utterance.
